name: vscode-side-translate
description: Translate Markdown or text into an editable side preview for bilingual reading and source replacement.

editor/title.when: editorLangId == markdown || editorLangId == plaintext || resourceExtname == .md || resourceExtname == .txt

enumDescriptions: Race Bing Translator and DeepL Free, then use the first successful result. Fastest is the default.
vscode-side-translate.provider.markdownDescription: Translation provider used by Side Translate. `fastest` sends the text to both Bing Translator and DeepL Free, then uses the first successful result.

vscode-side-translate.timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each translation request before the operation fails.

vscode-side-translate.maxCharacters.description: Maximum characters translated in one command run. Increase this only if the provider can handle larger documents reliably.
